items.description: Crash on I-76 westbound between 1 miles EAST of Exit 342: US 13/US 30 WEST - GIRARD AVE/PHILA ZOO and Exit 342: US 13/US 30 WEST - GIRARD AVE/PHILA ZOO. There is a lane restriction.
